Uses of Package
io.github.projectunified.craftcommand.processor.model

Packages that use io.github.projectunified.craftcommand.processor.model
Package
Description
io.github.projectunified.craftcommand.processor
Base annotation processor for CraftCommand.
io.github.projectunified.craftcommand.processor.bukkit
Bukkit-specific annotation processor for CraftCommand.
io.github.projectunified.craftcommand.processor.extension
SPI interfaces for extending the annotation processor.
io.github.projectunified.craftcommand.processor.model
Processor model classes that represent command metadata at compile time.
io.github.projectunified.craftcommand.processor.paper
Paper-specific annotation processor for CraftCommand.
io.github.projectunified.craftcommand.processor.parser
Argument parsing utilities for the annotation processor.
io.github.projectunified.craftcommand.processor.standalone
Standalone-specific annotation processor for CraftCommand.
io.github.projectunified.craftcommand.validation.processor.extension
 
  • Classes in io.github.projectunified.craftcommand.processor.model used by io.github.projectunified.craftcommand.processor
    Class
    Description
    CommandModel
    Model representing a parsed command or subcommand class.
    MethodModel
    Model representing a command or subcommand method.
    ParameterModel
    Model representing a command method parameter.
